info.title: Relationship Action Group

post.summary: Execute a Relationship use case and return its rows + metadata.
post.description: Runs one Relationship use case against the XSHI relationship file. Provide abaGroup for a group lookup or abaNumber for a single-ABA lookup.

useCase.description: The Relationship use case to execute.

params.description: Extracted parameters. Provide abaGroup for xshiFileAbaGroup, abaNumber for xshiFileAba.

200.description: Dispatch result for the Relationship use case.
